Source: Cursor Changelog
URL: https://cursor.com/changelog
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Cursor Changelog

## March 11, 2026: New Plugins on the Cursor Marketplace
- Over 30 new plugins from Atlassian, Datadog, GitLab, Glean, Hugging Face, monday.com, PlanetScale
- Read/write access and actions across expanded toolstack
- MCP-based plugins for cloud agent use in manual or automated workflows

## March 5, 2026: Automations
- Always-on agents based on custom triggers and instructions
- Trigger support: Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, webhooks, and schedules
- Memory tool for learning from past executions

## March 4, 2026: Cursor in JetBrains IDEs
- Available in IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm via Agent Client Protocol
- Supports frontier models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Cursor
- Authentication via existing Cursor accounts

## March 3, 2026 (v2.6): MCP Apps & Team Marketplaces
- Interactive UIs in agent chats with charts, diagrams, whiteboards
- Team marketplace for private plugin distribution with governance controls
- Debug mode enhancements

## February 26, 2026: Bugbot Autofix
- Cloud agents automatically fix detected pull request issues
- 35% of proposed changes merge into base branches
- Configuration for automatic branch pushes
